top_signals.title: China’s AI ascendance gives Xi a stage and a security dilemma
top_signals.summary: Beijing is now looking to jostle with the U.S. — the leading AI power — for influence through a new group of nearly 30 countries.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Trump takes the stage — without his longtime teleprompter operator
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump is poised to give a primetime speech on Thursday focusing on election security, although with a new teleprompter operator.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: New OkoBot framework deploys 20 payloads to steal data, crypto
top_signals.summary: A new malicious framework called OkoBot is delivering more than 20 payloads in attacks focused on stealing cryptocurrency wallet seed phrases, credentials, and other sensitive data. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
